You will be tasked with high-level infrastructure deployment and the integration of cutting-edge computing paradigms into an existing, complex ecosystem. This role offers a direct pathway to a specialist position within the firm upon successful completion of the internship or graduation.\r\n\r\nKey Responsibilities\r\nCloud Infrastructure & Deployment: Architect and set up the primary cloud environment to host our active constellation of 18 functional systems.\r\n\r\nFunding & Resource Acquisition: Research and execute applications for cloud credits and innovation funding (e.g., AWS Activate, Google for Startups, or Azure for Startups) to optimize infrastructure scaling.\r\n\r\nData Pipeline Management: Implement and manage robust data flows using Pub/Sub architectures, BigQuery, and Big Data frameworks.\r\n\r\nIoT Ecosystem Support: Maintain and optimize our IoT data layer utilizing SQL, MongoDB, and Hive.\r\n\r\nAdvanced System Integration: Assist in the bridge-building between our current architecture and neuromorphic and quantum computing modules.\r\n\r\nCandidate Requirements\r\nAcademic Excellence: Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science (or a related field) with a track record of exceptional marks.\r\n\r\nTechnical Proficiency: * Foundational knowledge of Cloud Service Providers (GCP, AWS, or Azure).\r\n\r\nPractical experience or strong academic projects involving SQL and NoSQL databases (specifically MongoDB).\r\n\r\nExposure to Hive or similar data warehousing tools for IoT applications.\r\n\r\nMindset: A \"Systems Thinking\" approach. You should be comfortable moving between high-level architectural theory and hands-on deployment.\r\n\r\nAmbition: A strong desire to specialize in next-generation computing (Quantum/Neuromorphic) and secure a long-term role within a growing fintech and AI entity.\r\n\r\nWhat You Will Gain\r\nResume-Building Experience: Hands-on experience securing venture-level cloud funding and deploying a multi-system AI constellation.\r\n\r\nMentorship in Deep Tech: Direct exposure to the integration of neuromorphic and quantum logic within established business systems.\r\n\r\nCareer Trajectory: A clear opportunity for a permanent specialist role at Sans Mercantile post-internship.\r\n\r\nEquity Opportunity: Discussion of equity stakes for candidates who demonstrate exceptional value and commitment to the companyâ€™s long-term vision.'","timestamp":1775126694957},{"id":"dLBK.tsx","source":"Chat Edit: 'Go to the Command Palette, type \"Local History: all files before 17:45 Entry \" and follow the prompts to restore the deleted files.
